title: Brooks Women's Adrenaline GTS 22 Supportive Running Shoe
description: Smooth and steady wins the run: our most-loved support shoe is better than ever. With an updated midsole made with 100% DNA LOFT, and featuring our trusted GuideRails support, the Adrenaline GTS 22 delivers our smoothest ride yet.
features: Imported

THIS WOMEN'S SHOE IS FOR: Runners looking for a smooth ride, with great cushion and trusted GuideRails support that won’t distract from the fun of the run. This Brooks Adrenaline GTS 22 is a certified PDAC A5500 Diabetic shoe and has been granted the APMA Seal of Acceptance. We recommend ordering Brooks running shoes 1/2 to one size larger than your dress shoe.

SUPPORT AND CUSHION: Provides just the right amount of stability and support, great for overpronation while providing high energizing cushioning. Ideal for road running, cross training, the gym or wherever you might want to take them! Predecessor: Adrenaline GTS 21
BALANCED, SOFT CUSHIONING: The updated midsole is now 100% DNA LOFT cushioning paired with the Segmented Crash Pad for an even softer, smoother ride and easier flow from landing to toe-off.
MODERNIZED FIT: More strategic use of the 3D Fit Print upper technology offers the structure and proven fit the Adrenaline is known for without excess bulk.

GUIDERAILS HOLISTIC SUPPORT SYSTEM: We've shifted our focus beyond the feet to the most injury-prone part of a runner’s body: the knees. GuideRails keep you moving comfortably by keeping excess movement in check.

reviews.title: Great Fit
reviews.text: Brooks are my favorite!  I'm on my feet a lot either working out or walking they always give me the support I need and they are comfortable all day!  I am 5' 10", 175lbs & 57 years young! I ordered a 10.5 and they fit perfectly.  I stopped buying size 10 altogether in all brands I think my feet got bigger as I got older and even though I don't like it the 10.5 gives my toes a little more room and being on the go I'm more about comfort and support.  They are always stylish and these are light grey, pink and black! Highly recommend!

reviews.title: Helped my Plantar Fasciitis

title: Yontune 2X Headlights for Crocs/Sneakers, LED Shoe Lights for Night Safety Running Shoe Lights for Night Runner Funny Gifts for Hiking Camping Walking The Dogs (Red)
features: ⛈️【High Quality & Weatherproof】Our runner shoe lights are made of aluminum alloy and ABS plastic, IPX5 Waterproof, these lights for shoes are built to withstand the toughest rainstorm. Rather it be snow or heavy rain, our gear got your cover.

🔆【Lightweight & Bright】They are pretty lightweight (each light weights only 25g). It stays stable while you walk or run without you even notice. These shoe lights for night safety are bright which can increase your visibility to avoid tripping on things and seeing the path. Let you see and be seen safely in the dark from dusk till dawn.

💡【Upgraded Hidden Switch】Press on the head of the shoe light to turn on/off and switch 3 different modes base on your need (Always Bright, Flashing, or Flashing slowly). It can retain power for 72 hours on its highest setting. An essential safety equipment for any low-light activity.

✨【Easy to Install】Night runner shoe lights the bottom design allows you to fix the shoe light on your shoelace or straps firmly. Note: Please remove the insulating paper between the two batteries at first.

🏃🏽【Application to All Outdoor Activities】Runners shoe lights for night safety, these lights for shoes are hands-free lighting solution for runners, hikers, or any outdoor enthusiast. You can safely trek through mountains, trails, or your own neighborhood knowing you’ve got reliable, safe lighting at all times. Whether running, cycling, walking, hiking, camping, fishing, or walking your dog.

reviews.title: Work great
reviews.text: I was excited to receive these. I also have a pair that stick in the hole on the shoes. I prefer these, however, because you can adjust where the beam is directed by moving the heel strap around. I use my crocs for taking care of the chickens. So this is great for the walk to the coop every night.

reviews.title: Good quality
reviews.text: Great little product gives good light and I can pop them on my tennis shoes for camping.

reviews.title: Fun little headlights for your shoes
reviews.text: I've had these lights on my shoes full time for the last few days, and I really like them for evening walks.  They don't replace a flashlight, but they do light up a fair amount of the path that I wouldn't otherwise see with my small flashlight.  I've smacked them against car doors and chair rails a few times, and they've stayed solidly on my feet and are no worse for wear.  They are great for visibility for others too - your feet move a lot, and so do these lights.  Add flashing and you're much more visible either walking or on a bicycle.  I think they'd also be great for camping, and maybe at a dance party (flashing feet might be fun!)  My only thought is that they seem a little pricey, but they are one of the few that go on shoe laces and not just popping into holes in Crocs.  They're quite sturdy and battery life is great too.

reviews.title: Perfect for early morning/night walking
reviews.text: I bought these lights for an upcoming hike to the Grand Canyon in October. We need to start our hike before sunrise and thought these would be the perfect accessory to stop us from tripping in the dark. What I like - they are small and lightweight, with a secure clip for my shoes. The battery is a standard size. They are easy to turn off and on. I'm undecided on if these are really bright enough to be practical... is there a light - yes. Is it going to replace a flashlight - absolutely not. I don't know if I'd buy these again for the purpose of a hike, but they would be good if you are an early morning/late evening walker and runner and want additional lights for safety so cars, etc, can see you.

reviews.title: They are ok
reviews.text:
Batteries are not working. I have to replace them right from the start. I hope they will work.

They seem a bit heavy but I will use them. Safety is more important.

reviews.title: Affordable and comfortable
reviews.text:
Update: I decided to keep these. Ok, so I am ashamed to wear them with jeans and a tee, I tried them for everyday but couldn't get over what I'll call the "dad sneakers" look. But I took these for a run and wow! They're very comfortable. A little clunky but flexible enough for daily training and the cushion is just right for me, sightly on the plush side but not squishy. These are my new daily runners. I don't know how long they'll last, but for the price, if I get 200 miles, I'll be happy.

Also, if you're a 3e/4e and you like or need a wide toe box, these will deliver. I'm a smaller 4e but i need a wide toe box, especially since I'm not willing to give up my injinji toe socks. These are very spacious with plenty of room for my toe splay.

-----

Original review: From the product pictures I wasn't sure if I'd like them or hate them. But for the price I figured I might as well try them. They fit nicely, have moderate cushion, and they're more flexible than I expected. They're basic sneakers, no bells or whistles. But they're comfortable enough I would try running in them. They're certainly not fashion forward, but I wouldn't be ashamed to wear them with jeans and a tee. And if you're looking for extra-wide these fit like a true 4e. I expected to hate them but I'm pleasantly surprised and I'll probably keep them and use they for everyday sneakers or runners.

title: ASICS Women's Gel-Cumulus 22 Running Shoes
description: The Gel-Cumulus 22 running shoe is the recommended choice for neutral runners who want a soft and flexible daily trainer with a great fit. This update features a one-piece superior mesh combined with a seamless 3D printing structure that balances support and comfort around the foot, giving you an excellent fit right away. Flytefoam midsole is softer than the previous version for comfortable riding. Under the heel where the foot hits for the first time the ground has been redesigned to better insulate the impact. This new heel design has deeper grooves on the forefoot and a softer midsole foam to give you a soft drive. A durable AHAR rubber sole has been placed in key contact areas to help the Gel-Cumulus 22 shoe withstand a ton of miles.

reviews.title: Light, neutral shoe
reviews.text: Saucony neutral running shoes are the only kind of running shoes that I have ever purchased. I had accepted that my feet can only tolerate running if I’m wearing the ugliest, clunkiest shoes. That’s changed with this pair. They are so lightweight and look nothing like my other pairs. I usually have to lace up my shoes differently, but haven’t had to do that with these. They’re so lightweight, but provide all of the support that I need

reviews.title: Lightweight and breathable
reviews.text:
Pros:
-Overall these shoes are pretty lightweight and breathable. Good amount of air flow with the mesh siding, however you need to take good care of these as the mesh can rip easier when you catch your foot on a step.
-I am a huge fan of saucony and have never had bad results with any of their shoes over the past 20 years. These shoes appear to be more of a basic model that I would expect to last about a year or 1 marathon season.
-No issues with blisters or rubbing.

Cons:
-There isn’t much grip/tread on the bottom of these shoes. For this reason, I don’t expect these to hold up as well as some of the other models of Saucony shoes I’ve had in the past.

reviews.text: I have been wearing Saucony shoes for a few years now. They're one of the few shoe brands that I can order without trying on first. I can count on their shoes being true fit. This pair is no exception. I have wide feet and it's hard to find shoes that fit period! Let alone being able to order them online. These are running shoes and I am not a runner. I do find them to be less cushiony than I am used to. Maybe it's because they are running shoes. They are still comfortable to wear. I like the black and silver colors.

title: Brooks Men’s Launch 9 Neutral Running Shoe
features: Imported

THIS MEN’S SHOE IS FOR: The Launch 9 is for neutral runners who want a dependable, lightweight shoe with DNA cushioning and a highly breathable upper that helps runners go fast on every run. We recommend ordering Brooks running shoes 1/2 to one size larger than your dress shoe.
NEUTRAL SUPPORT: Lightweight, streamlined, with even more BioMoGo DNA cushioning, the Launch 9 offers neutral support to keep you running faster mile after mile.
ENHANCED BREATHABILITY: Reengineered upper features Creel Warp mesh, designed to be extremely light and breathable. Hints of reflectivity on the upper to increase visibility on the road.

LIGHTWEIGHT CUSHIONING: We have added more BioMoGo DNA cushioning to the midsole for an even faster ride without the extra weight. A dynamically responsive ride for days when you are working on your speed.
RESPONSIVE TRANSITIONS: Redesigned midsole increased by 2 mm to provide runners with more responsiveness while the Green Rubber Outsole helps your foot move quickly from heel to toe.

title: ASICS Women's Gel-Nimbus 18 Running Shoe
description:
After 18 years of innovation, the Nimbus® series continues as one of the most recognized high performing footwear by ASICS. The new gel® placement offers modernized geometry of cushioning, designed to improve adaptability and mitigate brisk impacts. Improved guidance line® technology harmoniously syncs componentry to embrace the motions of the runner gait cycle.
In 1949, Mr. Kihachiro Onitsuka began his athletic footwear company (Onitsuka Co., Ltd.) by manufacturing basketball shoes out of his living room in Kobe, Japan. He chose the name ASICS for his company in 1977, based on a famous Latin phrase "Anima Sana In Corpore Sano," which, when translated, expresses the ancient ideal of "A Sound Mind in a Sound Body." Taking the acronym of this phrase, ASICS was founded on the belief that the best way to create a healthy and happy lifestyle is to promote total health and fitness. Today, ASICS offers a full line of performance-driven athletic shoes and technical active sports apparel and accessories dedicated to bringing harmony to the body and soul.
features: 100% Synthetic
Imported
Rubber sole
FluidRide: FluidRide  provides the ultimate combination of bounce back and cushioning properties with reduced weight and exceptional durability.
Rearfoot and Forefoot GEL Cushioning Systems: Attenuates shock during impact and toe-off phases, and allows movement on multiple planes as the foot transitions through the gait cycle.
FluidFit:  ASICS FluidFit upper technology combines multi-directional stretch mesh with stretch reinforcements that adapt to the athlete's foot, creating a truly customized glove-like fit.
Heel Clutching System: Exoskeletal heel counter provides improved support and creates improved heel fitting environment.
Seamless construction

title: Saucony Women's Triumph ISO 4 Running Shoe, Navy/Mint
description:
Ready for the run, anywhere and everywhere. Where the road ends, your run begins in the Cohesion TR11. With a reinforced upper for added protection and added durability and traction to the outsole, the Cohesion TR11 lets you tackle the toughest of trails and beyond, mile after mile.
Saucony is among the most respected names in running shoes. We offer a wide range of running and walking shoes, each with the Saucony trademark fit, feel and performance. We've spent years studying the biomechanics of top athletes. Our goal? To develop creatively engineered systems that maximize your performance in your specific activity, allowing you to focus on the activity instead of the equipment. From our studies have come many innovative Saucony concepts. Advanced technologies-like Grid, the first sole-based stability and cushioning system--provide an advantage to athletes of all types.

title: New Balance Men's 510 V5 Trail Running Shoe
description: Are you looking for a lightweight, durable and supportive pair of trail running shoes? Then your search ends with the New Balance 510v5. Durability on the outside meets responsive comfort inside for a lightweight running shoe that's as ready as you are for a trail run or whatever else your day has in store. Built with a rugged construction, these New Balance trail shoes offer relentless durability that is suitable for various runs both on- and off-road. The lugged outsole on these comfortable running shoes features AT TREAD technology which provides enhanced traction on the trail or the road, while the lightweight injection-molded EVA foam midsole includes both ABZORB technology for impact absorption and an NB Soft + Supportive Insert for memory comfort that lasts. For added protection, the reinforced Toe Protect tip helps protect your toes from rocks, roots and debris so you can go off-road with confidence.
features: 50% Synthetic, 50% Textile
Imported
Rubber sole

Cushioned Running Shoes: ABZORB midsole technology in this runner absorbs impact through a combination of cushioning and compression resistance, and the rubber outsole provides strength and durability
Built-In Off-Road Technology: Toe Protect technology helps protect feet from rocks, roots and debris, while AT Tread on the outsole provides versatile traction during both on- and off-road activities
Plush, Cushioned Running Shoes: These runners feature lightweight injection-molded EVA foam midsoles to provide lightweight cushioning and an NB Soft + Supportive Insert for memory comfort that lasts
Built to Last: With an all-over durable construction and an aggressive lugged outsole, these trail running shoes are designed to stand up to all of your outdoor activities
Athletic Aesthetic: With synthetic and mesh uppers that deliver breathability and a top-quality fit, these running shoes also boast a stylish look to fit in with your active lifestyle

THIS WOMEN'S SHOE IS FOR: The Bedlam 3 is perfect for runners who want a shoe that helps them by giving energy back with each step and supports the way their body naturally wants to move.

SECURE, SOCK-LIKE FIT: Redesigned Fit Knit upper provides a secure, sock-like fit that moves with you.

GUIDERAILS HOLISTIC SUPPORT SYSTEM: We’ve shifted our focus beyond the feet to the most injury-prone part of a runner’s body: the knees. GuideRails support keeps you moving comfortably by keeping excess movement in check.

reviews.title: Very comfortable shoe.
reviews.text:
The bottom of the shoe is thick.
But the overall weight of the shoe is not bad.
I feel like I have better contact than any other shoe I own.
I like the quality, money well spent.

reviews.title: Runs much smaller/shorter than the Lone Peak 6, and much stiffer than expected
reviews.text: I own a pair of Lone Peak 6 size 11 which have a little toe allowance.  Same size 11 Olympus 4 literally had my toes scrunched along the front of the shoe!  May have to go one whole size up for proper fitting.  They also felt a LOT stiffer than the Lone Peaks, which surprised me given they are supposed to have maximum cushioning;  the Lone Peaks actually feel more cushy to me.  Returning the 11s and mulling over whether I should bother trying a 11.5 or a 12, considering how much stiffer they felt.

reviews.title: HD user, Size 14 feet, torn knees 50+
reviews.text:
I tear up any shoes in 3-4 months and these ones hold up the best (4+months ave.)…I’ve destroyed many pairs and won’t use anything else. They are comfortable and allow me to continue working out with aches or injury (from hiking every day).
Size 14 ft
Wgt 250
Ex-Athlete with numerous knee and back injuries
Hike 6 miles per day and workout in the gym to maintain good fitness level.
Neuropathy in feet.
Compression fractures in back (old injury)

These shoes are made for Clydesdale ex-athletes like myself…I‘be been using Altra for 4 years…

reviews.title: A good shoe
reviews.text: As this is my third pair of Altra Olympus shoes, I can say I am a happy customer. Each pair has lasted just over 1000 miles trekking over rough terrain. The Vibram is great but only holds out so long. Thank you Altra. Great customer service too. 😜

title: New Balance Kids' 680 V6 Hook and Loop Running Shoe
description: The New Balance 680 v6 kids' running shoe is a sneaker that blends style and performance to satisfy both kids and adults alike. A modern design ups your little one's cool factor, featuring a no-sew construction for a sleek fit and feel that's snug and secure without being too tight, delivering both a comfortable fit and contemporary style. The streamlined silhouette on these running shoes for kids includes leather and mesh upper material with a stitched-down tip and foxing details for flexible support and lasting durability. These kids' performance shoes also include an ABZORB midsole that absorbs impact through a combination of cushioning and compression resistance, for a cushioned ride that takes kiddos from the classroom to the playground and everywhere in between. These comfortable kids' running shoes are available in a variety of colors that range from neutral to bold and bright, so your child can pick the one that suits their style and boosts their confidence.
features: Rubber sole
Power in Simplicity: The New Balance 680v6 running shoe for kids features a minimal leather and open mesh upper, offering flexible support and easy-breezy comfort
Modern Construction for an Outstanding Fit: The leather/mesh upper on these New Balance kids' running shoes features a stitched-down tip and foxing details to provide flexible support and durability
Soft Underfoot Cushioning: The ABZORB midsole absorbs impact through a combination of cushioning and compression resistance, giving these kids' running shoes a comfortable feel that lasts all day
Designed for Support and Durability: These kids' performance shoes feature a strong rubber outsole to offer long-lasting durability, built to stand up to daily use and playground wear-and-tear
Available in a Range of Colors: From neutral tones to bold hues, these cushioned running shoes for kids are available in a range of shades to suit the style and color preferences of your little one

reviews.title: Great for wide feet!
reviews.text: My son has bilateral clubbed feet, and he no longer wears braces but has a wide foot. New balance is the only brand that works for him. This particular model is perfect for him!

reviews.title: The best for extra wide feet
reviews.text: These shoes are perfect for my special needs child. He has extra wide feet and he has trouble with shoe tying.

reviews.title: Reviews are right about the quality
reviews.text: Wish I read the reviews more carefully. I’m so desperate to find shoes that fits my boys’ wide feet that I just assumed NB would be good because I’ve gotten them in the past. But no the quality is sub par. They are already falling apart and it’s only been 1.5 months. I’ll probably have to buy them new shoes soon which is a shame because it’s not like these are some off brand cheapies. You expect more from a company like NB.

reviews.title: 5 stars
reviews.text: These New Balance shoes are great. The insoles are so comfortable and I know that my little one is getting the protection that she needs for her growing feet. The shoes fit true to size, and they width is great. She has a normal foot, I wouldn't recommend them for a child with wide feet. They are comfortable to wear and look great. This particular style is great for young children due to the velcro. Most kids by the time they get to this style shoe CAN tie their own shoes, but its so much easier and quicker for them just to  be able to do the velcro and go!We love them.

reviews.title: Maybe I just got a defective pair of shoes...
reviews.text: The insoles don’t fit the shoes, nor were they glued in. So they kept sliding out. Nice looking shoe from a distance but they are falling apart.

title: ASICS Women's Gel-Nimbus LITE 3 Running Shoes
description: When it comes to creating a performance running style with sustainable practices, the GEL-NIMBUS LITE 3 shoes are the green standard. Designed with recycled materials, the mesh upper provides better support, breathability, and comfort. The midsole’s FLYTEFOAM cushioning is formed with organically derived materials. With laser cut details in the tooling, these features lighten the load placed on your body and help conserve resources.
features: Rubber sole
FLYTEFOAM cushioning is formed with organically derived materials that improve impact absorption an:
At least 50% of the shoe’s upper polyester are made with recycled materials.:
Laser-cut sidewall detailing: Improves deformation at footstrike.
Rearfoot and Forefoot GEL Technology Cushioning System: Attenuates shock during impact and toe-off phases, and allows movement in multiple planes as the foot transitions through the gait cycle.
Solution Dye Sockliner: Sockliner is produced with a solution dyeing process that reduces water usage and carbon emissions
